item.name: Betrayal at House on the Hill
Cat in the Box: Deluxe Edition
The Crew: The Quest for Planet Nine
EXIT: The Game – Dead Man on the Orient Express
EXIT: The Game – The Catacombs of Horror
The Fox in the Forest Duet
Goats & Goblins
item.comment: Is a simple enough game that it can be explained and played in 30 minutes, but had enough substance to keep it interesting. Played with 4 and really enjoyed it.

item.name: Happy Little Dinosaurs: 5–6 Player Expansion Pack

Tic Tac K.O.: Dragons vs Unicorns
